tweets.text: We honor Yanira Violeta Olivares Pineda from #ElSalvador, one of the 2018 #TIPReportHeroes. Learn more about her efforts to #endtrafficking: https://t.co/jHq5PaV8n1 https://t.co/CsBBVOnf7i
We honor Ivana Radovic from #Serbia, one of the 2018 #TIPReportHeroes. Learn more about her efforts to #endtrafficking: https://t.co/jHq5PaV8n1 https://t.co/e3hLG1c5za

This Week at State: @SecPompeo testifies on the FY2019 budget, @StateDept releases 2018 Trafficking in Persons report, the Secretary, joined by @IvankaTrump, honors #TIPReportHeroes, and more. https://t.co/wTUPUBntB9 https://t.co/UNMBpcROIF
We honor Josue Ango from #BurkinaFaso, one of the 2018 #TIPReportHeroes. Learn more about his efforts to #endtrafficking: https://t.co/jHq5PaV8n1 https://t.co/S6vASG0d5U
We honor Francisca Awah Mbuli from #Cameroon, one of the 2018 #TIPReportHeroes. Learn more about her efforts to #endtrafficking: https://t.co/jHq5PaV8n1 https://t.co/4EKGwxnO0n

On her last stop in #Hanoi, A/S Giuda met with Ambassador Kritenbrink & the embassy team. They discussed ways to further strengthen the U.S.-#Vietnam partnership. She took the opportunity to visit the Old Quarter, where she chatted with @yseali students & Vietnamese journalists. https://t.co/pC7puo4ksM

During a visit to Fulbright University, Assistant Secretary Michelle Giuda talked about the future of higher education in #Vietnam with faculty and students. She also shared her experiences as a Vietnamese-American and her hopes for the U.S.-#Vietnam relationship. https://t.co/TFZ34oUD4e

In #Singapore @EastWestCenter, A/S Giuda discussed opportunities & challenges facing media in Asia. Journalists came from India, Pakistan, East Timor, Philippines, Malaysia, Vietnam, Australia, Thailand, Indonesia, Cambodia, Burma, Mongolia, China & other Indo-Pacific nations. https://t.co/BHlOxcYN8O

This week, Assistant Secretary Michelle Giuda visited #Singapore and #Vietnam, where she engaged with international journalists, visited Fulbright University and @yseali students, and met with our diplomatic teams. https://t.co/lgqT5PTmee
We honor Dr. Yosief Abrham Mehari from #Sudan, one of the 2018 #TIPReportHeroes. Learn more about his efforts to #endtrafficking: https://t.co/jHq5PaV8n1 https://t.co/zgxfC3Tw0Y

.@ForeignPressCtr reporting tour gave international journalists the opportunity to speak with human trafficking survivor and activist Fainess Lipenga, and helped raise global awareness about the dangers of trafficking and the toll on its victims. https://t.co/6VuVSjguWx
We honor Maizidah Salas from #Indonesia, one of the 2018 #TIPReportHeroes. Learn more about her efforts to #endtrafficking: https://t.co/jHq5PaV8n1 https://t.co/PQAq7L6knM

On June 28 @SecPompeo and @IvankaTrump recognized the #TIPReportHeroes for their tireless efforts to protect victims, punish traffickers, and raise awareness about #humantrafficking. Read about their inspiring efforts to #EndTrafficking.  https://t.co/mPBCVqf7L9
We honor Ausamah AlAbsi from #Bahrain, one of the 2018 #TIPReportHeroes. Learn more about his efforts to #endtrafficking: https://t.co/jHq5PaV8n1 https://t.co/kBgTixL35A

ICYMI: @SecPompeo, joined by @IvankaTrump, announced the release of the 18th annual Trafficking in Persons Report and honored ten TIP Report Heroes from around the world. “Our commitment to fighting and ending human trafficking is strong.” https://t.co/G6skyO3I23 #EndTrafficking https://t.co/HrffSC9kEb
We honor Sunita Danuwar from #Nepal, one of the 2018 #TIPReportHeroes. Learn more about her efforts to #endtrafficking: https://t.co/jHq5PaV8n1 https://t.co/Iq1LKbZloW

This year’s @JTIP_State TIP Report highlights the importance of local communities in the fight against #humantrafficking and encourages national governments to support and empower their partners on the ground to #EndTrafficking. https://t.co/7xSJ7us6EW

.@jtip_state #TIPReportHero Francisca Mbuli “Despite being named heroes, not just us, but anyone, can & should get involved in fighting #humantrafficking. The more people who know & care, the more people we will save. Together, we can end modern day slavery.” #EndTrafficking https://t.co/3eaFy5GTfn

.@SecPompeo and @IvankaTrump honor this year’s Trafficking in Persons (TIP) Report Heroes -- ten outstanding individuals from around the world who are fighting to end human trafficking. #EndTrafficking https://t.co/MAzNN6D2C5

.@SecPompeo: We don’t shy away from pointing out countries that need to step up. We take these stories to heart. We use them as fuel to motivate us to action, as we work together to end human trafficking, once and for all. #EndTrafficking https://t.co/1uwF6MTzZM
.@SecPompeo highlights stories of progress in the fight against human trafficking from #Estonia, #Argentina, #Bahrain, #Cyprus, and across #Africa. #EndTrafficking https://t.co/GvR58eneGP

.@SecPompeo: This year’s TIP Report highlights the critical work of local communities to stop traffickers and provide support to victims. Human trafficking is a global problem, but it’s a local one too. Local communities are an essential part of the solution. https://t.co/ut5YcjWu02

Starting at 2pm ET: @SecPompeo, joined by @IvankaTrump, announces the release of the 18th annual Trafficking in Persons (TIP) Report and honors ten TIP Report Heroes from around the world. Watch the event live on https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz or https://t.co/4PAwVBoTVX. #EndTrafficking https://t.co/0Q2tQaZpoU

.@SecPompeo, joined by @IvankaTrump, will unveil the 2018 Trafficking in Persons Report today at 2pm ET. They will also recognize the 2018 #TIPReportHeroes, who have devoted their lives to #EndTrafficking. Learn more & go behind-the-scenes with us on Snapchat. https://t.co/Yd5BgU9FRf

US & #Japan reaffirmed shared interest in peace, stability & prosperity of Indo-Pacific region & shared views on common regional challenges, including maritime law enforcement. Both nations underscored importance of strong cooperation w/ Pacific Island countries & reg. partners. https://t.co/KQnqZN8Yv7

.@SecPompeo, joined by @IvankaTrump, will unveil the 2018 Trafficking in Persons Report today at 2pm ET. The TIP Report assesses gov't efforts around the world to #EndTrafficking. Watch live at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz & https://t.co/4PAwVBoTVX. More: https://t.co/c76Wikjiiq https://t.co/MBeSYFZkq3

France, Italy, UK & U.S. are concerned about announcement that Ras Lanuf & Sidra oil fields & facilities will be transferred to the control of an entity other than the legitimate National Oil Corporation. #Libya’s oil facilities, production & revenues belong to the Libyan people. https://t.co/14qdpZpbc6

Today @VP announced nearly $10 million in additional U.S. humanitarian assistance for Venezuelans who have fled their country due to the man-made crisis there. This new funding supports @UNMigration's regional response & @UN @WFP's emergency response efforts. https://t.co/AY4ReKsbMh

Special Presidential Envoy @brett_mcgurk provided an update on progress in #Iraq and #Syria and outlined the @Coalition’s increasing focus on defeating ISIS’s global networks at the meeting in #Morocco of the Global Coalition to Defeat ISIS. https://t.co/GvypuEv0O7

As we mark #WorldDrugDay, learn how @StateINL is combatting addiction and drug abuse around the world through innovative drug treatment and prevention programs. https://t.co/oRZHx1lFnK | More information: https://t.co/UOybAOcN96 #CrisisNextDoor https://t.co/bAcjREUTy1

.@SecPompeo at #SelectUSASummit: The United States the best destination in the world for entrepreneurship and innovation. https://t.co/rx6rRrp3o9

.@SecPompeo at #SelectUSASummit: The State Department has 200 Economics & Business officers in Washington & 1,500 economic officers posted in 190 countries. Many of them are specifically dedicated to helping international businesses & investors navigate & understand our market. https://t.co/v7FVlKNU8T
.@SecPompeo at #SelectUSASummit: “Economic security is national security.” https://t.co/1XopohlciX

.@SecPompeo at #SelectUSASummit: @POTUS Trump’s economic policies have made our advantages even more of a force multiplier for prosperity. His agenda is the most pro-business agenda from a President in history. https://t.co/Btpe3NrSne
.@SecPompeo at #SelectUSASummit: Now is the perfect time to bring your business and your investments to the United States. https://t.co/d0DUg6RZLN

Mattis will host Indian External Affairs Minister @SushmaSwaraj and Defense Minister @nsitharaman for meetings to strengthen our cooperation. https://t.co/YBxUYYpoHi

.@StateDept, @USAID & @DeptofDefense are pleased to announce release of the final report of  “Stabilization Assistance Review,” which lays out a framework for making diplomatic, development & defense engagements more efficient & accountable to taxpayers. https://t.co/qBbXxc4eeb
.@USUN Ambassador Nikki Haley announces the U.S. withdrawal from the @UN #HumanRightsCouncil. https://t.co/G1Zk7ZZhGT

.@SecPompeo: The United States which leads the world in humanitarian assistance, and whose service members have sacrificed life and limb to free millions from oppression and tyranny -- will not take lectures form hypocritical bodies and institutions. https://t.co/A93lHmVD4h

.@SecPompeo: the Human Rights Council has become an exercise in shameless hypocrisy -- with many of the world’s worst human rights abuses going ignored & most serious offenders sit on the council sit in pious and self-righteous judgement of others with infinitely better records. https://t.co/R1uYs0LZWE

.@SecPompeo: When organizations undermine our national interests and our allies, we will not be complicit. When they seek to infringe on our national sovereignty, we will not be silent. https://t.co/dULTSd5LE7

.@SecPompeo will give remarks on “Promoting Global Economic Prosperity” at the 2018 #SelectUSASummit on Friday, June 22, 2018. Foreign direct investment in the U.S. is a key contributor to U.S. economic growth, supporting nearly 13 million American jobs. https://t.co/3Yyht9S69i https://t.co/Ny4Mr1YoHc

.@statedeptspox: We once again condemn release of a convicted terrorist, Dimitris Koufodinas. He is on a 2-day furlough from a Greek prison. @USEmbassyAthens has conveyed our serious concerns about this decision to #Greece’s Gov't. Terrorists should not get a vacation from jail. https://t.co/yyTMYVDOfW

.@statedeptspox: The #SelectUSASummit, hosted by @CommerceGov from June 20-22, is the highest-profile event dedicated to promoting foreign business investment in the United States. @SecPompeo will deliver remarks at the Summit on “Promoting Global Economic Prosperity” on June 22. https://t.co/JZzP3bvvCt

On International Day to #EndRapeInWar, U.S. joins international community in standing with the survivors of sexual violence in conflict. We recommit to eliminating sexual violence in conflict and securing accountability and lifesaving support for victims. https://t.co/YWT2GgkKpZ

The Troika (#Norway, the #UnitedKingdom and the United States) condemns the ongoing clashes between the Sudan Liberation Army-Abdul Wahid (SLA-AW) and Government of #Sudan forces as well as inter-tribal violence in the Jebel Marra region of #Darfur. https://t.co/FAj38T3p3r

Read how the @StateDept, in partnership with agencies across the federal government, creates millions of jobs for American workers by opening markets and eliminating trade barriers overseas and by attracting foreign direct investment to the United States. https://t.co/6JtqyC0Smz
Today, @SecPompeo welcomed President @juanorlandoh of #Honduras to the State Department. @usembassyhn https://t.co/yvoQU8RsdT
.@SecPompeo at @deteconomicclub: A lot has changed in the 24 years since #NAFTA was first put into place, and our goal is to achieve an outcome that rebalances that situation. https://t.co/L5Iyw1xe8y
.@SecPompeo at @deteconomicclub: Our diplomacy puts American workers and American businesses first. https://t.co/fuaabG0cFV

.@SecPompeo at @deteconomicclub: We are taking a hard line on practices that threaten America’s technology leadership, such as intellectual property theft and forced technology transfer. https://t.co/WXFBhweRf1

.@SecPompeo at @deteconomicclub: We are working hard to attract international investment in the United States. International investments mean private sector investments as well. https://t.co/mAuEYpOAUd

.@SecPompeo at @deteconomicclub: We are creating as many markets as possible for American goods and services. If it is an American product, we want to gain access for it in as many markets as possible. If Americans have market access, we will out-compete our foreign rivals. https://t.co/PUkAbtV9oh
.@SecPompeo at @deteconomicclub: We are maintaining our sovereignty on the world economic scene. We will never compromise our national economic sovereignty. https://t.co/tU8eGuYgsK

.@SecPompeo at @deteconomicclub: Making sure American businesses can do what they do best is critical for stimulating the prosperity that undergirds our security and our freedoms. https://t.co/awVcqYSftH

.@SecPompeo at @deteconomicclub: Economic diplomacy means we use American economic power and influence as a tool of foreign policy to benefit Americans. We build relationships that create jobs, sustain American businesses, and spur economic growth. https://t.co/exy3pP34LF
Live now! @SecPompeo delivers remarks on “America’s Economic Revival” to the @deteconomicclub in Michigan. Watch live at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz and https://t.co/4PAwVBoTVX. https://t.co/5NCbUmVEdl
